title: Seiler 4 × 8
description: VO2max accumulation in a polarized framework
purpose: VO2max accumulation in a polarized framework

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 5 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 112% for 8:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 8:00 at 112%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 8 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 8:00 at 108-112%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/5.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/5. 8:00 at 112%. Cadence: 95-100 rpm. Seated. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/4. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2/4. 112%, 95-100 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 43% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 4min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 43% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 43% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. 112% for 8:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 57% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 112% FTP × 8:00. After rest, expect 65% for 20min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 57% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 57% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. 112% for 8:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 20:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 59 minutes of Z2 work. 90-100 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 20:00 at 65%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20:00 at 65-65%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 88% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 88% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
